en: Why, it's just the way it looks
Dreams come true somewhere far away
The best day of the year, there's a view
A strange view somewhere I want to stay
That's my life, it's a beautiful galaxy
Be a writer, a fantasy in my eyes
ko: 작가가 되어, 내 눈 속의 환상

en: What's open to me tomorrow is a big big stage
ko: 내일 나에게 열리는 것은 큰 무대

en: So that is how I love
Look at me, look at me, look at me now
ko: 나를 봐, 나를 봐, 지금 나를 봐

en: It's a different, thrilling me from yesterday
I'm sky high, oh my god high
ko: 나는 하늘 높이, 오 마이 갓 높이

en: All the little things are far away
Look at me now, look at me now
ko: 지금 나를 봐, 지금 나를 봐
